segments.caption: The video opens with a bright yellow screen displaying the text 'Viu Viu' in red, accompanied by a Captain America shield icon, suggesting a playful or thematic introduction. The scene then transitions to a live broadcast of the FIFA Women's World Cup France 2019, as indicated by the on-screen graphics and the FOX logo. The camera captures a wide aerial view of a stadium where two teams, one in red (USA) and the other in light blue (Thailand), are lining up on the field for the pre-match ceremony. The teams walk out through a tunnel, flanked by young mascots and officials, with large national flags of the USA and Thailand being carried on the field. The crowd is visible in the stands, waving flags and cheering. The players, including USA’s Megan Rapinoe with pink hair and Alex Morgan wearing jersey #13, are shown in close-up as they prepare for the match. The captains, Rapinoe and the Thai captain, shake hands with the referee and each other, symbolizing sportsmanship. The USA team is seen warming up, with Rapinoe stretching and jogging. The camera briefly cuts to the USA coaching staff on the bench, including a coach in a gray jacket with a USA crest, who appears focused and engaged. The atmosphere is electric, with the stadium filled with anticipation for the upcoming match.

The scene transitions to a wide aerial view of the pitch during the FIFA Women's World Cup France 2019, showing the USA in red and Thailand in light blue jerseys. segments.caption: The video segment captures a pivotal moment in the FIFA Women's World Cup France 2019 match between the USA and Thailand. The action begins with the USA in possession, advancing the ball into Thailand's half. A well-executed pass leads to a scoring opportunity, culminating in a goal by Alex Morgan, who is seen leaping in celebration with her arms raised. The scoreboard updates to USA 1–0 THA at 13:33, triggering an eruption of joy from the Stadium Crowd, including a woman in a red USA jersey screaming in excitement. The camera cuts to a replay showing the goal from multiple angles: a close-up of the ball entering the net past the Thai Goalkeeper, who dives but fails to stop it, and a slow-motion view of Morgan’s powerful strike. The USA players, including USA Player #3, rush to celebrate with Morgan, embracing and high-fiving. The Thai National Team players react with disappointment, while the Referee Team signals the goal. The scene shifts to a later moment where a USA player in red slides to intercept the ball from a Thai player in light blue, showcasing intense defensive effort. The match continues with the USA maintaining pressure, as seen in a wide shot of the field with players positioned for an attack. Throughout, the stadium is filled with fans waving flags, and on-screen graphics display the tournament name, score, and time, with advertisements for VISA, Qatar Airways, and KIA visible along the sidelines.

The action intensifies as Alex Morgan, wearing red jersey #13, scores a goal with a powerful strike, sending the ball past the Thai Goalkeeper in yellow, who dives but fails to stop it. Alex Morgan leaps in celebration, high-fiving teammates, including USA Player #3, who embraces her warmly. The Thai National Team players react with disappointment, while the USA players continue their jubilant celebration. The stadium is filled with energy, with banners for 'Qatar Airways' and 'Coca-Cola' visible along the sidelines. The on-screen graphics consistently display 'FIFA Women's World Cup France 2019' and the live score, with the time ticking from 17:39 to 23:28. The atmosphere is electric, with the crowd’s excitement palpable as the USA extends their lead.

segments.caption: The video segment captures a dynamic sequence from the FIFA Women's World Cup France 2019 match between the USA and Thailand, with the scoreline progressing from 2-0 to 3-0 in favor of the USA. The action begins with a Thai player in a light blue jersey attempting to intercept the ball near the sideline, while a USA player in red (number 3) is seen in close proximity. The scene quickly shifts to a VAR review, shown via a split-screen with the FIFA VAR Room and on-field footage, as a USA player in red (number 9) is seen falling near the goal after a challenge. The referee, in a bright green uniform, signals for a review. The play resumes with the USA team advancing, and a free-kick is taken from the right side of the penalty area. The ball is struck powerfully toward the goal, and the Thai goalkeeper in yellow dives but fails to save it, resulting in a goal. The scoreboard updates to 3-0. The USA players, including the player with pink hair (Megan Rapinoe, number 15) and Alex Morgan (number 13), erupt in celebration, hugging and jumping in joy. The camera captures close-ups of the jubilant players, including USA Player #3 (blonde hair, number 3) embracing Alex Morgan. The stadium crowd, waving American and Thai flags, reacts with excitement, and a woman in a red USA jersey is seen screaming in celebration. The on-screen graphics display the match time, score, and tournament branding, including Coca-Cola, Qatar Airways, and Orange advertisements along the pitch. The sequence ends with a replay of the goal from multiple angles, highlighting the moment the ball crosses the line and the goalkeeper’s unsuccessful dive.

segments.caption: The video segment captures the final moments of the first half of the FIFA Women's World Cup 2019 match between the USA and Thailand, with the scoreline at 3-0 in favor of the USA. The action begins with the USA in possession, advancing the ball into Thailand's half, where a USA player in red attempts a shot that is blocked by the Thai defense. The camera follows the play closely, showing a Thai defender in light blue intercepting the ball and clearing it. The USA continues to press, with multiple players in red jerseys making runs toward the goal, while the Thai goalkeeper in yellow remains alert. A key moment occurs when a USA player in red is tackled near the penalty area, leading to a foul call and a stoppage in play. The referee, in a bright green uniform, signals the foul, and the USA players react with frustration. The scene transitions to the half-time break, with the scoreboard confirming the 3-0 lead and listing the goal scorers: Morgan (12'), Lavelle (20'), and Horan (32'). The camera then cuts to a crowd of enthusiastic fans at the Lehigh Valley Soccerfest in Bethlehem, PA, celebrating the USA's performance, waving flags, and cheering. The atmosphere is electric, with fans in USA jerseys and patriotic attire, including one woman in a red USA jersey screaming in excitement. The segment ends with a wide shot of the stadium, showing the players walking off the field as the half-time graphics display the score and goal details.

segments.caption: The video segment captures a dominant performance by the USA women's soccer team during the FIFA Women's World Cup France 2019, specifically in Group F against Thailand. The action begins with a wide aerial view of the pitch, showing USA in red jerseys and Thailand in light blue, with the scoreboard indicating a 3-0 lead for the USA at 49:26. The scene transitions to a close-up of the USA bench, where a coach in a gray USA-branded jacket and a woman in a blue jacket are clapping, reflecting the team's momentum. The focus then shifts to Megan Rapinoe, identifiable by her pink hair and red jersey with 'RAPINOE' and number 15, celebrating a goal with a joyful embrace from teammate Alex Morgan, who wears number 13. The scoreboard updates to 4-0 at 59:33, followed by a replay of the goal where Rapinoe scores with a powerful shot past the Thai goalkeeper in yellow. The crowd erupts in celebration, with fans waving American flags and cheering. The video then shows a subsequent goal, bringing the score to 5-0 at 52:50, with Alex Morgan scoring after a well-placed shot that the Thai goalkeeper fails to save. Morgan celebrates with a leap and high-fives, while the crowd continues to cheer. The final moments show a wide-angle view of the field as the USA maintains control, with the scoreboard at 53:06, and a close-up of USA Player #3, a blonde player in red jersey number 3, walking off the field during the half-time break. The stadium is filled with vibrant energy, with banners for Qatar Airways and Wanda visible, and the FOX broadcast logo indicating live coverage. The atmosphere is electric, with fans in the stands waving flags and celebrating the USA's commanding lead.

segments.caption: The video segment captures a dominant performance by the USA women's soccer team in the FIFA Women's World Cup 2019 match against Thailand, with the scoreline escalating from 11-0 to 13-0. The action begins with a USA player in red (Megan Rapinoe, #15) scoring a goal after a swift attack, followed by a close-up of her celebrating with teammates, including Alex Morgan (#13), who is seen embracing her. The camera then cuts to the USA bench, where the coaching staff and substitutes erupt in celebration, with one coach in a blue jacket jumping in excitement. The scene shifts to a wide-angle view of the field, showing the USA team maintaining relentless pressure, with multiple players in red advancing toward the Thai goal. A subsequent goal is scored by another USA player, with the ball finding the net past the Thai goalkeeper in yellow, who dives but fails to stop it. The USA players celebrate again, with Rapinoe and Morgan hugging and running joyfully. The crowd in the stadium is visibly energized, waving flags and cheering. The final moments show a Thai player in light blue (M. Chinwong, #3) looking dejected as the USA continues to dominate, with the scoreboard reflecting the 13-0 lead. The on-screen graphics consistently display the match time, score, and tournament branding, including 'FIFA Women's World Cup France 2019' and sponsor logos like Qatar Airways and VISA. The atmosphere is electric, with the USA team’s confidence and skill on full display.

segments.caption: The video segment captures the final moments of a dominant USA victory in the FIFA Women's World Cup France 2019 match against Thailand, with the scoreline at 13-0. The sequence begins with a close-up of a USA player in a red jersey (number 10, identified as LLOYD) dribbling the ball before a shot is taken, resulting in a goal as the ball flies past the Thai goalkeeper in yellow, who dives but fails to save it. The camera then cuts to the crowd, where fans in USA-themed attire, including one woman in a red jersey and another wearing a patriotic hat, cheer enthusiastically. The scene shifts to a wide view of the field during stoppage time, showing players from both teams in their respective red and light blue kits, with the scoreboard indicating 92:01 and +3 minutes added. As the match concludes, players from both teams begin to shake hands and show sportsmanship, with USA players in red jerseys and Thai players in light blue jerseys exchanging gestures of respect. The final score is displayed as 'FULL TIME USA 13-0 THAILAND', with a scrolling list of goal scorers including Morgan, Lavelle, Horan, Mewis, and others. The USA players, including one with pink hair (Megan Rapinoe) and another with blue hair (USA Player #8), are seen embracing teammates and staff, including a coach in a blue jacket who jumps in celebration. The Thai goalkeeper, in a yellow jersey, is shown walking off the field with a USA player, displaying mutual respect. The segment ends with a red screen displaying 'Thanks For Watching Subscribe Now!' in white text.
